mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CONSULTATION_SESSIONS ( SESSION_ID, USER_ID, DOCTOR_ID, STATUS, TITLE, MESSAGE_COUNT, STARTED_AT, DEL_FLAG, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{doctorId}, #{status}, #{title}, 0, NOW(), 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT SESSION_ID AS sessionId, USER_ID AS userId, DOCTOR_ID AS doctorId, DIFY_CONVERSATION_ID AS difyConversationId, DIFY_WORKFLOW_ID AS difyWorkflowId, STATUS AS status, TITLE AS title, INITIAL_MESSAGE AS initialMessage, LAST_MESSAGE AS lastMessage, LAST_MESSAGE_AT AS lastMessageAt, MESSAGE_COUNT AS messageCount, RATING AS rating, FEEDBACK AS feedback, CLOSE_REASON AS closeReason, STARTED_AT AS startedAt, ENDED_AT AS endedAt FROM CONSULTATION_SESSIONS WHERE SESSION_ID = #{sessionId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0

SELECT SESSION_ID AS sessionId, USER_ID AS userId, DOCTOR_ID AS doctorId, STATUS AS status, STARTED_AT AS startedAt FROM CONSULTATION_SESSIONS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS = 1 AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY STARTED_AT DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE CONSULTATION_SESSIONS SET LAST_MESSAGE = #{lastMessage}, LAST_MESSAGE_AT = NOW(), MESSAGE_COUNT = #{messageCount}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE SESSION_ID = #{sessionId}
UPDATE CONSULTATION_SESSIONS SET STATUS = 2, ENDED_AT = NOW(), RATING = #{rating}, FEEDBACK = #{feedback}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE SESSION_ID = #{sessionId} AND STATUS = 1
